rows.label: tev036101_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Yuyu if anything is troubling her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036101_MSG0001
rows.name:
My job is to decide how to divide the
cargo up among the Ma-non, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036101_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Oh, you want to know what's
inside? Machines, silly. They've
all been sent here from NLA, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Some need repairing or upgrading, you
see? But the city wants us to to
repurpose others into new inventions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036101_MSG0004
rows.name:
And that's why my job is so important, I guess? If I
don't get the machines to Ma-non with the right
qualifications, we'd have a disaster on our hands, no?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036101_MSG0010
rows.name:
Nothing makes me happier than
enjoying a a nice grenade pizza
with my sweetheart Aqual, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036101_MSG0013
rows.name:
Unfortunately, we don't get much time
as a couple these days because of all
the work BLADE dumps on him, you see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036101_MSG0014
rows.name:
But while I miss him, I know he's
busy making a difference, isn't
he? So he needs my my support...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036101_MSG0015
rows.name:
...What's the phrase you use?
I need to corner him? No, wait.
I need to be IN his corner![ST:wait ]
